mapper.select: SELECT pd.plan_detail_no, pd.plan_no, pd.place_no, pd.user_no, pd.plan_visit_order, pd.plan_meno, pd.detail_start_date, pd.detail_end_date, p.place_address, p.place_latitude, p.place_longitude, p.place_thumbnail_url AS placeThumbnailUrl, CASE WHEN p.place_name IS NOT NULL THEN p.place_name WHEN pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(pd.plan_meno, CHR(10)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(pd.plan_meno, 1, INSTR(pd.plan_meno, CHR(10)) - 1) ELSE pd.plan_meno END AS place_name FROM Plan_Details pd LEFT JOIN Place p ON p.place_no = pd.place_no WHERE pd.plan_no = #{value} ORDER BY NVL(pd.plan_visit_order, 9999), pd.plan_detail_no

SELECT pd.plan_detail_no, pd.plan_no, pd.place_no, pd.user_no, pd.plan_visit_order, pd.plan_meno, pd.detail_start_date, pd.detail_end_date, p.place_address, p.place_latitude, p.place_longitude, p.place_thumbnail_url AS placeThumbnailUrl, CASE WHEN p.place_name IS NOT NULL THEN p.place_name WHEN pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(pd.plan_meno, CHR(10)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(pd.plan_meno, 1, INSTR(pd.plan_meno, CHR(10)) - 1) ELSE pd.plan_meno END AS place_name FROM Plan_Details pd LEFT JOIN Place p ON p.place_no = pd.place_no WHERE pd.plan_detail_no = #{value}

SELECT CASE WHEN p.place_name IS NOT NULL THEN p.place_name WHEN pd.plan_meno IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM( CASE WHEN INSTR(pd.plan_meno, CHR(10)) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(pd.plan_meno, 1, INSTR(pd.plan_meno, CHR(10)) - 1) ELSE pd.plan_meno END ) ELSE 'Unknown Place' END FROM Plan_Details pd LEFT JOIN Place p ON p.place_no = pd.place_no WHERE pd.plan_no = #{value} ORDER BY NVL(pd.plan_visit_order, 9999), pd.plan_detail_no

SELECT DISTINCT tm.tag_name FROM Plan_Details pd INNER JOIN Place_Tag_Map ptm ON ptm.place_no = pd.place_no INNER JOIN Tag_Master tm ON tm.tag_code = ptm.tag_code WHERE pd.plan_no = #{value} ORDER BY tm.tag_name

SELECT DISTINCT tm.tag_category FROM Plan_Details pd INNER JOIN Place_Tag_Map ptm ON ptm.place_no = pd.place_no INNER JOIN Tag_Master tm ON tm.tag_code = ptm.tag_code WHERE pd.plan_no = #{value} ORDER BY tm.tag_category

SELECT MAX(p.place_thumbnail_url) KEEP ( DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY NVL(pd.plan_visit_order, 9999), pd.plan_detail_no ) FROM Plan_Details pd INNER JOIN Place p ON p.place_no = pd.place_no WHERE pd.plan_no = #{value} AND pd.place_no IS NOT NULL

SELECT DISTINCT pd.plan_no FROM Plan_Details pd INNER JOIN Place p ON p.place_no = pd.place_no WHERE (NVL(p.place_address, '') LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%' OR NVL(p.place_name, '') LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%')
